text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "---------- CONSULTATION regarding the request for: PSYCHIATRIC EXAMINATION of: 28/PHONE_NUMBER:53 ---------- Consulting physician: Dr. PERSONS_NAME on: 28/PHONE_NUMBER:23 Patient arrived in the Emergency Department sent by their attending mental health center physician (Dr. PERSONS_NAME) due to manic episodes.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Patient has been under long-term care for Schizoaffective Disorder, with previous admissions to a Psychiatric Diagnostic and Treatment Center; currently being treated with clozapine 100 mg 1 tablet x 2/day and flurazepam 30 mg 1 tablet/day, ; medications were discontinued a few days ago.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Since yesterday, mental confusion, mood swings, and thought derailment.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "The RELATIVE therefore took the patient to the Mental Health Center to see their attending physician, who recognized the need for hospitalization.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "At the time of my arrival, the patient was dysphoric, coprolalic.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Thought characterized by derailment and grandiose content.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Expansive mood.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "No self-harm, suicidal or homicidal ideation.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "Requires hospitalization in the Psychiatric Diagnostic and Treatment Service; the patient accepts hospitalization.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "An interview is carried out with the RELATIVE.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "Therapy based on EN 5 mg 1 vial in 100 c sf and Haldol 2% 25 drops is administered.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "She is hospitalized after performing blood chemistry tests, ECG, and negative antigen swab.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "--------------------", 0.0, 0.5)
